# LEVONIS

> LEVONIS is Iraq's trusted electronics and 3D printing store — Bambu Lab, Creality, Resin printers, filaments, smart devices, and a merchant community marketplace.

LEVONIS sells 3D printers (Bambu Lab, Creality, Resin), filaments and resins, accessories and spare parts, plus a curated catalog of electronics and smart devices shipped across Iraq with official warranty and fast delivery. The site also hosts a merchant community for custom prints and a rewards / loyalty program.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured products, categories, and offers.
- [About](/about): Company story, mission, and contact info.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about ordering, warranty, and delivery.
- [Bundles](/bundles): Time-limited product bundles and discounted kits.
- [Offers](/offers): Active product offers and promotions.
- [Community](/community): Merchant marketplace for custom 3D print requests.
- [Donations](/donations): Public donation leaderboard and giving page.
- [Download App](/download-app): Android app for LEVONIS.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user data is handled.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Site usage terms.
